title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team uses with Claude Code to drive rapid growth: automating workflows, identifying sub-threshold work now worth doing, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He argues that understanding these strategies helps avoid the pitfall where AI becomes extra work rather than leverage.
